response.global_analysis: The audio features the latter half and conclusion of the song 'Acacia' by BUMP OF CHICKEN, followed by a dialogue segment. The provided Reference JSON contains lyrics for the beginning of the song, which do not phonetically match the audio in this segment (which starts mid-chorus). I have ignored the irrelevant JSON lyrics and relied on the audio and hardcoded song title in the top-left corner to transcribe the lyrics and dialogue. Timestamps are precisely synchronized to the vocal audio, with semantic splits for the conversation.

subtitles.original: ゴールはきっとまだだけど もう死ぬまでいたい場所にいる
subtitles.english: The goal is surely still far off, but I'm already in the place where I want to stay until I die.

subtitles.original: 隣で 君のそばで 魂がここだと叫ぶ
subtitles.english: By your side, near you, my soul screams that I am here.

subtitles.original: 泣いたり笑ったりする時 君の命が揺れる時
subtitles.english: When we cry and laugh, when your life trembles,

subtitles.original: 誰より特等席で 僕も同じように 息をしていたい
subtitles.english: In the seat of honor more than anyone else, I want to keep breathing just like you.

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, yeah, aha
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, yeah, aha

subtitles.original: 君の一歩は僕より遠い 間違いなく君のすごいところ
subtitles.english: Your step is further than mine, without a doubt, that's what's amazing about you.

subtitles.original: 足跡は僕の方が多い 間違いなく僕のすごいところ
subtitles.english: I have more footprints, without a doubt, that's what's amazing about me.

subtitles.original: 真っ暗闇が怖い時は 怖さを比べ ふざけながら行こう
subtitles.english: When the darkness is scary, let's compare our fears and go while fooling around.

subtitles.original: 太陽がなくたって歩ける 君と照らす世界が見える
subtitles.english: I can walk even without the sun, I can see the world lit up with you.

subtitles.original: 言えないこと 聞かないままで 消えない傷の意味知らないままで
subtitles.english: Leaving things unsaid, without asking, without knowing the meaning of the wounds...

subtitles.original: でも 目が合えば 笑えるのさ 涙を挟んでも
subtitles.english: But if our eyes meet, we can laugh, even through tears.

subtitles.original: 転んだら 手を貸してもらうよりも 優しい言葉選んでもらうよりも
subtitles.english: If I fall, rather than having you lend a hand, or choosing kind words,

subtitles.original: 隣で信じてほしいんだ どこまでも一緒に行けると
subtitles.english: I want you to believe in me by my side, that we can go anywhere together.

subtitles.original: ついにたどり着くその時 夢の正体 愛に触れる時
subtitles.english: When we finally arrive, when we touch the true nature of dreams and love,

subtitles.original: 必ず 一番そばで 君の目に映る景色にいたい
subtitles.english: I definitely want to be the closest one, in the scenery reflected in your eyes.

subtitles.original: あの輝きを 君に会いたから見えた
subtitles.english: That radiance, I saw it because I met you.

subtitles.original: あの輝きを 確かめに行こう
subtitles.english: Let's go check that radiance.

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, yeah, aha
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, yeah, aha

subtitles.original: どんな最後が待っていようと もう離せない手を繋いだんだよ
subtitles.english: No matter what kind of end awaits, I've already held your hand and won't let go.

subtitles.original: 隣で隣で 君のそばで
subtitles.english: By your side, by your side, near you,

subtitles.original: 魂がここだよと叫ぶ
subtitles.english: My soul screams that I'm right here.

subtitles.original: そして理由が光る時 僕らを理由が抱きしめる時
subtitles.english: And when the reason shines, when the reason embraces us,

subtitles.original: 誰より近くで 特等席で
subtitles.english: Closer than anyone, in the seat of honor,

subtitles.original: 僕の見た君を君に伝えたい
subtitles.english: I want to tell you about the you that I saw.

subtitles.original: 君がいることを君に伝えたい
subtitles.english: I want to tell you that you are here.

subtitles.original: そうやって始まったんだよ
subtitles.english: That's how it all started.

subtitles.original: そうやって始まったんだよ
subtitles.english: That's how it all started.

subtitles.original: うわ〜！ママ達〜！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Mothers!

subtitles.original: ママ〜！ ママ〜！
subtitles.english: Mama! Mama!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう〜！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: おめでとう！ おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Congratulations! Congratulations!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 騒がしいなｗ
subtitles.english: So noisy! lol

subtitles.original: お前に言われたくないわｗ
subtitles.english: I don't want to hear that from you!

subtitles.original: 確かに、奏ちゃんが一番浮き足立ってるじゃんｗ
subtitles.english: True, Kanade-chan is the most excited one!

subtitles.original: だ、だって誕生日だから！
subtitles.english: B-Because it's my birthday!

subtitles.original: そうだねｗ
subtitles.english: That's true.

subtitles.original: お母さん達、産んでくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Mothers, thank you for giving birth to me!

subtitles.original: 産んではいないｗ 産んではないｗ
subtitles.english: We didn't give birth to you! We didn't!

subtitles.original: その誤解やめてｗ
subtitles.english: Stop that misunderstanding!

subtitles.original: こちらこそだよ〜ｗ
subtitles.english: The pleasure is ours!

subtitles.original: ママですけども、産んでませんｗ
subtitles.english: We are the mothers, but we didn't give birth!

subtitles.original: はい、そして今日は何を話すんですか？ ここから
subtitles.english: Okay, so what are we talking about now?

subtitles.original: そうですね、えーと、これまでのコラボでの感想を...
subtitles.english: Well, uh, our impressions of the collaborations so far...

subtitles.original: めちゃめちゃ喋るじゃんｗ
subtitles.english: She's talking so much!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫かな？ 言うてｗ
subtitles.english: Is she going to be okay? Go on.

subtitles.original: じゃあ一番印象深かったの何？ 奏ちゃんが
subtitles.english: So, what was the most memorable one for you, Kanade-chan?

subtitles.original: でも、言うてママズでやったコラボって、実は1個しかない...
subtitles.english: But, to be honest, there's actually only one 'Mamas' collab...

subtitles.original: あ〜！ 懐かしい！
subtitles.english: Ah! Nostalgic!

subtitles.original: 懐かしいｗ アンタなぁ〜ｗ
subtitles.english: Nostalgic lol. You...

subtitles.original: あれ、でもそういえば、なんか赤い髪の毛の人...
subtitles.english: Wait, but speaking of which, that person with red hair...

subtitles.original: おれ？
subtitles.english: Me?

subtitles.original: やっぱりあれじゃない？ 『産んだ』とか言う...
subtitles.english: Isn't it that one? The one who says 'gave birth'...

subtitles.original: あ〜ｗ あの方は...
subtitles.english: Ah lol. That person...

subtitles.original: あ、でもスケジュール的に... ちょっと都合が合わなくて...
subtitles.english: Oh, but in terms of schedule... the timing didn't work out...
